title: xantolis assamica
intro: Xantolis assamica, also known as the Assam xanthosoma, is a plant species that belongs to the family Achariaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Xantolis assamica include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
